summary: Sprint 2 backend testing: Communities (10 seeded groups, join toggle, posts, likes) and Teams (create, list, get, owner-cannot-join, join/leave toggle, notifications) all working correctly. Auth login and /videos/feed sanity checks pass.
passed: GET /api/communities returns 10 seeded communities with slug/name/icon/joined=false unauth
POST /api/communities/{slug}/posts creates post with user + liked=false
POST /api/posts/{post_id}/like toggles like and increments/decrements likes count (0->1->0 verified)
POST /api/teams creates team with members_count=1 and owner role
GET /api/teams returns list with owner populated
GET /api/teams/{id} returns team with owner + members array with user populated
POST /api/teams/{id}/join: other user joins, members_count increments to 2, notification created for owner (type team_join)
notes: Sprint 2 endpoints match spec. Slug 'creator-hub-1543' mentioned in request appears to be a copy-paste of the domain prefix; actual seeded slugs are doctors/photographers/cafes/restaurants/artists/entrepreneurs/designers/musicians/actors/writers. Testing was done using 'artists' slug. Register endpoint is /auth/signup (not /auth/register).
